summary: Menu.tsx has been updated to reference the three new image paths under /assets/generated/. However, the actual image files (porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png, party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png, party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png) do not appear in the diff as added files under frontend/public/assets/generated. The code references are in place, but the physical image assets are missing from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image file porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png is not listed as an added file under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image file party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png is not listed as an added file under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files. The image file party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png is not listed as an added file under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: All three images load without errors in the browser.
missing_requirements.reason: Since none of the three image files appear as added files in the diff, they would not be served as static assets and would fail to load in the browser.
